title: Khorma
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Khoma-Polyhedron165.png|thumb|right|250px|Khorma, mistakenly spelled Khoma on a map of Tof Soren]]
'''Khorma''' was the largest of the three neighborhoods in [[Tof Soren]] on [[Ord Vaxal]]. Khorma peacekeepers were better equipped than other neighborhood peacekeepers and pinned a small black disk to their chests as a way to identify each other.

Khorma was the location of one of Ord Vaxal's most famous weapon emporiums. The Khorma Weapon Market primarily carried [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrowers]] built by artisans on Ord Vaxal with a very limited number of [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]] which were left over from the Ord Vaxal jailbreak twenty years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Ord Voxal">{{PolyhedronCite|165|Ord Vaxal: Prison Planet of the Empire}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Khorma is mistakenly listed as 'Khoma' on the Tof Soren map, but is correctly referred to as 'Khorma' throughout the article.
